name: verify
description: Verify if customers can view their own transaction history
descriptionHtml: Verify if customers can view their own transaction history

labels.name: story
labels.value:
As a Customer,
  I want to view my transactions, deposit funds,
  and withdraw money so that I can manage my finances effectively.
